name: Sherlock
one_line: Open-source CLI that finds a username across 400+ social networks (OSINT).
self_serve_detail: No account or key needed: install via pipx install sherlock-project or run the Docker image. It is a local Python CLI with no hosted API or credentials.
api_surface: No hosted API; Python CLI only

name: GitHub
one_line: Git-based source-control and developer platform with repos, issues, PRs, and CI.
self_serve_detail: Free GitHub account; generate a Personal Access Token (classic or fine-grained) in Settings > Developer settings with no approval. OAuth Apps / GitHub Apps for acting on behalf of users.

name: Netlify
one_line: Hosting/platform for building, deploying, and serving web apps and static sites.
self_serve_detail: Free account; generate a Personal Access Token (Bearer) in User Settings > Applications > Personal access tokens, no approval. Register an OAuth app for public integrations.

name: Cloudflare
one_line: CDN, DNS, security, and edge/compute platform (Workers, R2, etc.).
self_serve_detail: Free account; create API Tokens (Bearer) in My Profile > API Tokens, or use the Global API Key + email header. No human approval required.

name: Supabase
one_line: Open-source Firebase alternative: hosted Postgres, Auth, Storage, and Edge Functions.
self_serve_detail: Free project; API keys (anon publishable + service_role secret JWT) are shown in Project Settings > API Keys, no approval. Personal Access Token for the Management API in account tokens.
